findings.problem: The chapter's central confrontation cycles through accusation and denial for too long before new causal information arrives; the witness reveal that changes the chapter's stakes lands late, so momentum stalls in the middle third.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten the exchange in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:63-97: compress the first accusation loop (63-71) into one sharper turn, move the redaction-condition conflict earlier (around 75-87), and bring Benny's factual interruption in by the early part of that span so causal movement starts sooner.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in the revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:63-97 span, no accusation/denial cycle is repeated more than once and the first new factual witness detail about Tomas appears before the end of the third major exchange after Deena's introduction; FAIL otherwise.

findings.problem: There is a 10+ paragraph stretch in the office confrontation where the focalizer has almost no explicit internal experience, so the scene reads like external blocking and transcript rather than close-third pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:51-73, add brief interior beats tied to Marisol's thought/sensation/self-assessment (for example after Deena's first accusation and after Marisol's first two replies) while preserving scene tempo.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:51-73 span includes at least 3 paragraphs with explicit Marisol interiority and no run longer than 6 consecutive paragraphs without interior experience; FAIL otherwise.

findings.problem: The early Deena/Marisol argument leans into transcript cadence: several adjacent turns restate institutional-position versus family-position without adding distinct new leverage, which temporarily flattens dialogic pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:63-83 so each turn introduces a new pressure vector (legal exposure, union representation protocol, evidence scope, publication condition). Keep Marisol's high-contraction stressed register active in this span and reduce slogan-like restatement.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:63-83, each Marisol line either concedes, reframes, or requests a concrete condition, and no two adjacent turns merely restate the same institutional-vs-family claim without new tactical information; FAIL otherwise.

findings.problem: A recurring transition formula ("By the time ...") appears three times at major scene pivots, creating a noticeable structural tic.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast at least two of the openings at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:191, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:241 with different syntactic entries (for example one sensory-first and one action-first) while preserving chronology.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter uses "By the time" no more than once across those three transition points and each transition opens with a distinct sentence shape; FAIL otherwise.

findings.problem: The repeated anaphora ("She kept seeing ...") runs four times in one paragraph and starts to sound mechanical instead of accumulative.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the paragraph at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:237 so the obsessive loop remains, but vary syntax and verb choice; keep no more than two identical repeated stems and ensure each image adds a distinct inference.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:237, the exact stem "She kept seeing" appears at most twice and the paragraph still presents three concrete images tied to three different conclusions; FAIL otherwise.

summary: Chapter 5 cleanly hits boundary beats and preserves canonical continuity and past-tense narration, but it does not clear pass-level quality: the union-office middle stretch loses leverage efficiency and interior pressure, and repeated prose constructions create detectable formula drift.
